channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Waltz: Trump Administration Prioritizes Iran's Nuclear Program
item.description: The Trump administration is concentrating on Iran's nuclear program as talks continue in Switzerland, according to the U.S. ambassador.

item.title: Pence Criticizes Iran Deal in Opinion Piece
item.description: Former Vice President Mike Pence opposed the U.S.-Iran memorandum of understanding in an opinion piece, praising certain aspects.

item.title: Obama Center Called Activism Hub, Not Traditional Library
item.description: Critics argue the Obama Presidential Center on Chicago parkland serves as an activism hub for his foundation rather than a traditional library.

item.title: Jasmine Crockett Sparks Controversy Over James Talarico Comments
